choices.text: LangGraph Platform (managed) OR FastAPI + Docker on AWS/Cloud Run (self-hosted). Platform: one-click deploy + auto-scaling + integrated tracing. Self-hosted: more control + lower cost at scale. Streaming endpoints for real-time UX. Authentication + rate limiting + monitoring required for production.

questions.explanation: LangGraph Platform managed OR FastAPI + Docker self-hosted.

questions.prompt: Production agent; rate limiting + cost protection needed?

choices.text: Implement per-user rate limits + cost budgets + LLM call quotas. Without limits: malicious users / bugs can rack up massive bills (saw this with early OpenAI integrations spamming GPT-4 calls). Implementation: 1) Per-user QPS via Redis. 2) Daily token budgets per user. 3) Conversation cost caps. 4) Recursion limits on graphs. 5) Alert on anomaly (10x typical usage). 6) Hard caps that stop serving on budget exceeded. Standard production AI ops; not optional. Many startups have learned this lesson via $50K surprise bills.

questions.explanation: Rate limits + budgets + quotas + alerts + hard caps. Required for production.
